calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Compliance With San Franciscos Administrative Subpoenas Issued To Lumi Worldwide Inc. And Catherine Zhang
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Victoria Wong, Deputy City Attorney and S. Anne Johnson, Deputy city attorney (415-554-4721) for Petitioner/Moving party CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
Philip Gregory, Esq. (650-697-6000) for Respondent/opposing party Lumi Worldwide through Court Call.
Court reporter: Holly Thuman, CSR #6834, 415-357-4300, Reported.

Hearing is held. The Court states there is no case that supports that the 5th amendment privilege applies to a corporation or corporate officer. Both sides ARGUED. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Enforce Compliance With San Franciscos Administrative Subpoenas Issued To Lumi Worldwide Inc. And Catherine Zhang is taken under submission. Parties to prepare a stipulation/proposed order to be submitted to the Court, which will be the ruling of the Court. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Holly Thuman, CSR #6834, 415-357-4300, Reported.
